description: sandals from fila are made with fine fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. These Wiser floaters from fila are an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The synthetic upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. These sandals are perfect for braving the Indian monsoon and for general rough use. Wear these with your off-duty essentials.UpperSynthetic upper in an attractive design with forefoot, collar and ankle straps, complete with Velcro fasteners for a snug FitCushioned lining for greater comfort on the ankle strap and collarAppliqué d logo on the strapsDetachable back strap so that floaters can be worn as sandalsCushioned footbed with branding pattern for soft massage feel and all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for durabilityFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetSandal careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
